title: WIN MR Protocol: FORECAST
author: Aikin, Nicola
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Protocol for the acquisition of MRI data for the study "FORECAST". 

 Conducted at the  Wellcome Centre for Integrative Neuroimaging (WIN), University of Oxford . 

  Please see the  FORECAST protocol  in the WIN MR Protocols Database to ensure this is the latest version.  

  Authors' list and CRediT roles:  

 
	 Aikin, Nicola (ORCID: 0009-0009-7097-5683): MR protocol optimisation, Data acquisition 
	 Campbell, Jon (ORCID: 0000-0003-4757-1655): Ethics and MR safety protocols reviewing/editing, MR protocol optimisation, Scanning procedure editing/reviewing, Data acquisition 
	 Clare, Stuart (ORCID: 0000-0001-6421-9990): Funding acquisition, Conceptualisation, MR protocol optimisation 
	 Koushesh, Soraya (ORCID: 0009-0002-9998-5120): Patients' recruitment, MR protocol optimisation, Data acquisition 
	 Parker, David: MR protocol optimisation, Data acquisition 
	 Ridgway, Lucy(ORCID: 0009-0009-0242-701X): Ethics and MR safety protocols reviewing/editing, Patients' recruitment, Conceptualisation, MR protocol optimisation, Data acquisition 
	 Sanders, Michael: Ethics and MR safety protocols reviewing/editing, MR protocol optimisation, Scanning procedure editing/reviewing, Data acquisition 
	 Schmid, Annina (ORCID: 0000-0001-7759-0211): Funding acquisition, Ethics and MR safety protocols reviewing/editing, Conceptualisation, MR protocol optimisation, Project management 
	 Semple, Juliet (ORCID: 0000-0001-5752-3572): MR protocol optimisation, Scanning procedure editing/reviewing, Data acquisition 
	 Tachrount, Mohamed (ORCID: 0000-0003-1147-3412): Funding acquisition, Conceptualisation, Scanning procedure editing/reviewing, MR protocol optimisation, Data analysis 
 

 Acknowledgements: This project is funded by the Advanced Pain Discovery Platform (UK Research and Innovation (UKRI) and Versus Arthritis)
